name: animateicons-turkish-lira
title: Animated Turkish Lira Icon
author: AnimateIcons
description: Renders an animated turkish lira SVG icon with hover and imperative controls.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.
Guarded imperative startAnimation against isAnimated={false} and reduced-motion preferences.

license.scope: icons/lucide/turkish-lira-icon.tsx, lib/utils.ts, and Lucide-derived SVG geometry

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target. Guarded imperative startAnimation against isAnimated={false} and reduced-motion preferences.
modifications.reason: Resolve the bundled upstream helper without a consumer alias and ensure controlled animation honors explicit disablement and reduced-motion preferences.
